items.title: Elon Musk calls himself a fool for giving OpenAI $38 million that became an $800 billion company
items.raw_content:
Elon Musk called himself a "fool" in court, warned of a "Terminator" future, and admitted that xAI taps OpenAI's models for its own AI training. Week one of Musk's trial against Sam Altman delivered plenty of drama; and the best may still be ahead.

The artic
items.ai_summary: 马斯克在法庭上称自己为傻瓜，因给OpenAI投资3800万美元却使其成长为8000亿美元公司；警告AI可能导致“终结者”未来；承认xAI使用OpenAI模型训练。

items.title: ChatGPT now tracks users for ads by default as OpenAI looks for new revenue
items.raw_content:
OpenAI has turned on marketing cookies by default for free ChatGPT users in countries where ads are running. Tracking is automatically active for free accounts but not for paying subscribers. You can disable it in your account settings.

The article
items.ai_summary: OpenAI默认开启免费ChatGPT用户的广告跟踪，付费用户不受影响，用户可在账户设置中关闭。

items.title: xAI drops Grok 4.3 with steep price cuts and an Imagine agent mode for creative projects
items.raw_content:
With Grok 4.3, xAI is leaning into low prices and better tool use. The model shows gains on practical tasks, but it still trails the top models from OpenAI and Anthropic. The release also brings a new agent-based image generator.

The article
items.ai_summary: xAI发布Grok 4.3，大幅降价并新增Imagine代理模式用于创意项目，但性能仍落后于OpenAI和Anthropic的顶尖模型。

items.title: Meta acquires Assured Robot Intelligence to accelerate humanoid robot push
items.raw_content:
Meta has acquired robotics AI startup Assured Robot Intelligence to accelerate its work on humanoid robots. The goal is an open platform for the entire industry, similar to what Android did for smartphones.

The article
items.ai_summary: Meta收购机器人AI初创公司Assured Robot Intelligence，加速人形机器人研发，目标打造类似安卓的开放平台。

items.title: First Chinese AI startups are reportedly ditching offshore structures to register directly in China
items.raw_content: After Beijing blocked Meta's takeover of Manus, China's securities regulator signaled that companies hoping to go public should be registered at home. Now AI startups like Moonshot AI and StepFun are considering dissolving their foreign holding structures and registering d
items.ai_summary: 中国AI初创公司因监管要求，考虑取消海外架构转向国内注册。

items.title: Eight tech giants sign Pentagon deals to build an "AI-first fighting force" across classified networks
items.raw_content: Eight tech companies are supplying AI for classified US military networks, part of the Pentagon's push to build an "AI-first fighting force." Anthropic is notably absent from the list after the company rejected a usage clause and got flagged as a security risk.
items.ai_summary: 八家科技公司与五角大楼签约，为美军保密网络构建“AI优先作战力量”，Anthropic因拒绝使用条款被列为安全风险而缺席。

items.title: Big tech's AI spending balloons to $725 billion this year
items.raw_content:
Big tech keeps pouring more money into AI data centers, chips, and infrastructure. According to the Financial Times, Google, Amazon, Microsoft, and Meta have a combined budget of around $725 billion for next year.

The article
items.ai_summary: 大型科技公司AI支出激增至7250亿美元。

items.title: Microsoft puts an AI legal agent inside Word for contract review
items.raw_content:
Microsoft is bringing an AI agent for lawyers straight into Word. The "Legal Agent" reviews contracts, suggests edits, and checks clauses against internal guidelines.

The article
items.ai_summary: 微软在Word中集成AI法律代理人，辅助合同审查。

items.title: ChatGPT's goblin obsession may be hilarious, but it points to a deeper problem in AI training
items.raw_content: A faulty reward signal during training caused ChatGPT models to start dropping goblins, gremlins, and other mythical creatures into their answers at a surprising rate. OpenAI says it's an example of how small, poorly tuned training incentives can produce unexpected side eff
items.ai_summary: ChatGPT因训练信号错误出现输出异常，暴露AI训练深层问题。

items.title: Anthropic launches Claude Security to give defenders the same AI edge attackers already have
items.raw_content:
Anthropic wants to give cyber defenders an edge with Claude Security, drawing on the same offensive capabilities it recently deemed too dangerous to release in another model.

The article
items.ai_summary: Anthropic发布Claude Security，利用AI增强网络安全防御。
